2604.27850.title: Reasoning over Object Descriptions Improves Coreference Resolution in Task-Based Dialogue Systems
2604.27850.paper_summary: Task-based dialogue systems assist users in achieving specific goals, such as executing actions or retrieving information, through natural language interactions. Accurate coreference resolution is essential, as it involves identifying object references within the dialogue - a task that becomes increasingly challenging in visually grounded environments characterized by complex scenes and diverse object metadata. However, coreference resolution in task-based dialogue remains limited by poor generalization across domains and heavy reliance on supervised models that often overfit to dataset-specific artifacts. In this work, we propose a unimodal test-time reasoning approach that enables large language models (LLMs) to reason over detailed object metadata and dialogue history to improve coreference resolution. Empirical results on the SIMMC 2.1 dataset demonstrate that LLMs can generate step-by-step reasoning processes that effectively align dialogue context with objects present in the scene. Extensive experiments highlight the models' ability to link conversations and objects accurately. Moreover, we show that test-time reasoning under few-shot settings generalizes effectively to unseen scenarios and novel objects, outperforming encoder-based supervised methods in cross-domain evaluations. These findings underscore the critical role of structured metadata and careful prompt engineering in enhancing the robustness and generalization of task-oriented dialogue systems.
2604.27850.paper_summary_zh: 任務導向對話系統透過自然語言互動協助用戶達成特定目標，例如執行動作或檢索資訊。準確的共指解析至關重要，因為它涉及在對話中識別對象參考——這在以視覺為基礎的環境中變得越來越具挑戰性，這些環境特徵是複雜的場景和多樣的對象元數據。然而，任務導向對話中的共指解析仍然受到跨領域的泛化能力不足和對監督模型的高度依賴的限制，這些模型往往會過度擬合於特定數據集的特徵。在這項工作中，我們提出了一種單模態測試時推理方法，使大型語言模型（LLMs）能夠對詳細的對象元數據和對話歷史進行推理，以改善共指解析。對SIMMC 2.1數據集的實證結果顯示，LLMs可以生成逐步推理過程，有效地將對話上下文與場景中的對象對齊。大量實驗突顯了模型準確鏈接對話和對象的能力。此外，我們顯示在少量樣本設置下的測試時推理能有效泛化到未見的場景和新對象，在跨領域評估中超越基於編碼器的監督方法。這些發現強調了結構化元數據和謹慎的提示工程在增強任務導向對話系統的穩健性和泛化能力中的關鍵作用。
2604.27850.author: Oier Ijurco et.al.
2604.27850.authors: Oier Ijurco, Oier Lopez de Lacalle
